question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest average Bonus # in New York's lottery winning numbers? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A lottery analyst wants to see whether the bonus number distribution shifts year to year.

1.fact: In the NY Lotto dataset, averaging Bonus # by draw year for 2005-2010, 2005 has the highest average at 33.59047619047619.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest average Bonus # in New York's lottery winning numbers? (Parse Draw Date to Year; compute the mean Bonus # by Year; select the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Compute the average Bonus # by year (2005-2010) and select the maximum; the peak year is 2005.
